title: The Mimic-Bird (Eddy's Familiar)
bodyText:
A strange **mimicking bird from the Feywild**, introduced as Eddy's familiar (~S23). It has **wandered the depths for a long time searching for Silus** — and found him, buried inside Eddy ([[pc-eddy]]).

> [!dm] The living tease for the **Eddy-or-Silus** choice. It knows the soul, not the body — a Fey creature bonded to **Silus**, now circling the man who wears him. Use its mimicry + recognition to surface "Silus stuff" and pull Jake toward the climactic choice at the Pool. Possible link to **Gwen** (Silus's partner, [[ideas-parking-lot]]).

# Threads
